titleStmt.title: SII 20.391: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 391. (B.K. No. 18 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated Śaka 14 • •, Vilambi, Prathama-Jyēshṭha, Śu• 1, Monday. The details regularly correspond to A.D. 1538, April 29, if the Śaka year was 1460.

The inscription registers a deed of settlement of dispute between the Jainas headed by Saṁkhaṇāchārya and Hēmaṇāchārya of the Śaṅkha-basti and Kāḷahastidēva and Śivarāmadēva of the temple of Dakshiṇa-Sōmēśvaradēva regarding the use of certain honours which had been misappropriated by the Jainas for their deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mallikārjunamahā
karābjajō jitajagaḥ śrīkāḷahastīśvaraḥ . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 14
neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada prathama jēṣṭa śu 1 sōmavāradallu śrīmaddakṣiṇa sōmēśvaradēvara divyaśrīpādapadmā
rādhakarappa dvāvāpyathvimahāmahattinoḷagāda kāḷahastidēvaru śivarāmadēvaru gaṇa
voḍeyaru mukhyavāda mukhyavāda marttyalōkada mahāgaṇaṁgaḷige jina
ya śrēṣṭarāda śaṁkabastiya saṁkhaṇācāryya hēmaṇācāryyaru mukhyavā
ru koṭṭa jayapatrikākramaveṁteṁdaḍe . nāu niṁma sōmēśvara dēva
gaḷāgi saluva Aṣṭadikpālādigaḷa dhvajapatākādigaḷanu nāu namma śaṁ
khabastiya śāṁtitīrththakaraṟōtsāha veya prajñāhīnateyiṁda meṟasida saṁbaṁdha nīu
māḍida śikṣegaḷigoḷagāgi kālatrayadoḷuṁ vēdaśāstrapurāṇāgamādigaḷoḷuṁ salla veṁdu śrī
kāḷahastidēvara satyavacanasamudāyadiṁ kēḷida jiyaṁbaṭṭu nāu naṁma jinasamayakke Aṣṭa
dikpā lādigaḷu dhvajapatākādigaḷu sallaveṁdu koṭṭa jayapatrike . śrī sōmanāthaṁ gaṇakumāra
dhināyakana rakṣisali . nākē tvaṁ kāḷahastīṁdrō lōkēsminkāḷahasti rāṭ vākcāturyyaguṇādi
dhē kōtra bhuvi rājatē . śrī sōmanātha . © yī jayapatrikeya paḍeda karttarugaḷa
ya maṭhada liṁgaṁṇoḍeyaru dēvara pūjeya dēvaru Aṁnadāni dēvaru bhōgava dēvaru
dēvaru vīrabasavarājadēvaru nāḍakaṁtheya dēvaru bhō ḍeyaru
rācaveṭṭiyoḍeyaroḷagāda huligeṟeya puranivāsigaḷappa martyalōkada mahā
gaṇaṁgaḷu . © . śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.391 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
